# Primary sources

These sources are version-sensitive. Revalidate them against the deployed tool, client, or
database version before relying on version-specific guidance.

- Python argparse: https://docs.python.org/3/library/argparse.html
- Python packaging: creating command-line tools: https://packaging.python.org/en/latest/guides/creating-command-line-tools/
- POSIX utility syntax guidelines: https://pubs.opengroup.org/onlinepubs/9799919799/basedefs/V1_chap12.html
- Click parameters: https://click.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/parameters/
- Click documentation: https://click.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/documentation/
